structural.title: Function is isolated in the callgraph

limitations: These checks are static. They do not execute the application.
High-confidence graph facts are stronger than heuristic source checks.
Dynamic imports, reflection, dependency injection, framework routing, generated code, and runtime configuration can hide valid paths from static analysis.
Type and argument compatibility checks need language-specific type information for high accuracy.
